revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used internally by [[Template:Fb-rt]] and others. It is '''not''' intended to be transcluded directly.
See [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]] for further information. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Flag template system cores]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flagright%2Fcore%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flagright%2Fcore%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used internally by [[Template:Fb-rt]] and others. It is '''not''' intended to be transcluded directly.
See [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]] for further information. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Flag template system cores]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
